description: User examines the survey results and individual responses for the transaction history preference question

description: User hovers over the 'Show filter' icon in the Filters panel, triggering a tooltip
frame_description: Tooltip 'Show filter' is visible over the eye icon in the right-hand sidebar

description: User clicks the 'Show filter' icon, which applies a filter and updates the data visualization
frame_description: The bar chart percentages change from 65%/35% to 80%/20% and a blue badge appears on the Filters button

description: User reviews the filtered survey results
page_title: Askable | Studies / Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations

description: User clicks the 'Show filter' icon again to remove the active filter
frame_description: The data visualization reverts to the original 65%/35% distribution
